notes: US public-transportation trade association. Publishes APTA Recommended Practices including cybersecurity guidance (e.g., APTA-SS-CCS-RP-001 Securing Control and Communications Systems in Transit Environments). Members-only / paid.

data.notes: Members-only. The dominant cybersecurity recommended practice for US public-transit agencies.
